{{Item
| image = All orbs.gif
| id = 
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 64
| Description = 
}}
List of Locator Orbs
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!No.
!Orb
!Name
!ID
!Description
!Unique Crafting Material
|-

|1
|[[File:Locator orb chi.png]]
|Chi
|doggytalents:locator_chi_orb
|The Orb of Wisdom and Knowledge.
|Magenta Dye
|-
|2
|[[File:Locator orb chu.png]]
|Chu
|doggytalents:locator_chu_orb
|The Orb of Loyalty and Faithfulness.
|Light Blue Dye
|-
|3
|[[File:Locator orb ko.png]]
|Ko
|doggytalents:locator_ko_orb
|The Orb of Filial Piety.
|Purple Dye
|-
|4
|[[File:Locator orb gi.png]]
|Gi
|doggytalents:locator_gi_orb
|The Orb of Justice and Morality.
|Blue Dye
|-
|5
|[[File:Locator orb tei.png]]
|Tei
|doggytalents:locator_tei_orb
|The Orb of Brotherhood.
|Yellow Dye
|-
|6
|[[File:Locator orb rei.png]]
|Rei
|doggytalents:locator_rei_orb
|The Orb of Propriety and Respectability.
|Lime Dye
|-
|7
|[[File:Locator orb shin.png]]
|Shin
|doggytalents:locator_shin_orb
|The Orb of Trustworthiness and Credibility.
|Green Dye
|-
|8
|[[File:Locator orb jin.png]]
|Jin
|doggytalents:locator_jin_orb
|The Orb of Humanity and Benevolence.
|Red Dye
|-
|9
|[[File:locator orb_dyable.png|32x32px]]
|Dyeable
|doggytalents:locator orb_dyable
|Craft with Paper to add a Secondary color.
|Paper
|-
|10
|[[File:Locator orb ka.png|32x32px]]
|Ka
|doggytalents:locator_ka_orb
|The Orb of Flame.
|
|-
|11
|[[File:Locator orb sui.png|32x32px]]
|Sui
|doggytalents:locator_sui_orb
|The Orb of Water.
|
|-
|12
|[[File:Locator orb moku.png|32x32px]]
|Moku
|doggytalents:locator_moku_orb
|The Orb of Vegetation.
|
|}


{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| Unique Crafting Material<br>+ [[Empty Locator Orb]]
|[[File:Locator orb crafting.gif]]
|}

<span id="usage"></span>

== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
[[File:Rgb doggo.gif|thumb|437x437px|Orb Frenzy!]]

== Trivia ==
* The (1-8) orbs were added in DTN 1.16.0.
* The Double Dyeable Orb was introduced in DTN 1.18.12.
* The (10-12) orbs were introduced in DTN 1.18.33.
* When using [[Canine Tracker]] the color of the text will change according to the Orbs color.
* The items are direct references to '''The Satomi Power Orbs''' from the game '''OKAMI''' <ref><p>https://okami.fandom.com/wiki/Canine_Warriors</ref>

<references />
